metadata.author: Visa Inc.
metadata.comments: Solution template for Visa Threat Intelligence (VTI)

metadata.description: Not used, but needed to pass arm-ttk test `Location-Should-Not-Be-Hardcoded`.  We instead use the `workspace-location` which is derived from the LA workspace
[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

properties.description: VTIP_high_severity_domain_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.5
This will alert when a collision is detected for EmailUrlInfo events with VTI high severity domain IoCs
properties.displayName: VTI - High Severity Domain Collision Detection
properties.query:
EmailUrlInfo
| join kind=inner (VisaThreatIntelligenceIOC_CL  | where IOCType == "domain" and SourceSeverity == "High")
on $left.UrlDomain == $right.Value

properties.displayName: VTI - High Severity Domain Collision Detection

properties.description: VTIP_high_severity_sha1_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.5
This will alert when a collision is detected for DeviceFileEvents events with VTI high severity SHA1 IoCs
properties.displayName: VTI - High Severity SHA1 Collision Detection
properties.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| join kind=inner (VisaThreatIntelligenceIOC_CL  | where IOCType == "sha1" and SourceSeverity == "High")
on $left.InitiatingProcessSHA1 == $right.Value

properties.displayName: VTI - High Severity SHA1 Collision Detection

properties.description: @{workbookKey=VTIFeedDashboard; logoFileName=Visa_VTI_Logo.svg; description=Visa Threat Intelligence Feed Dashboard; dataTypesDependencies=System.Object[]; dataConnectorsDependencies=System.Object[]; previewImagesFileNames=System.Object[]; version=1.0; title=Visa Threat Intelligence Feed Overview; templateRelativePath=VTI_IOC_Feed.json; subtitle=; provider=Visa}.description

connectorUiConfig.title: Visa Threat Intelligence
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
# Visa Threat Intelligence Connector
This connector collects Indicators of Compromise (IOC) from the Visa Threat Intelligence Platform (VTIP) using HTTP polling and API Key-Shared Secret Authentication (X-Pay Token).

dataTypes.name: VisaThreatIntelligenceIOC_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
VisaThreatIntelligenceIOC_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(12h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Visa API access
customs.description: Access to Visa Threat Intelligence API: API Key-Shared Secret Authentication (X-Pay Token)

parameters.content:
## Base Configuration

Provide the base URL for your VTIP API endpoints.

parameters.text: Enter the base URL of your VTIP API endpoints without trailing slash (e.g., https://api.visa.com)

parameters.content: > Follow Visa Developer Tutorials [API Key and Shared Secret (X-Pay Token)](https://developer.visa.com/pages/working-with-the-visa-api#decrypting-shared-secrets) to get api key and decrypted shared secret

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = iff(isempty(audit.createdOn), now(), todatetime(audit.createdOn)) , IOCType = tostring(entity.type) , Value = tostring(entity.value) , Classification = ['classification'] , SourceSeverity = ['srcSeverity'] , SourceConfidence = ['srcConfidence'] , KillChain = ['killChain'] , Offense = ['offense'] , IsApt = ['apt'] , ThreatActor = ['threatActor'] , ExpiresOn = ['expiresOn'] , CreatedOn = todatetime(audit.createdOn) , UpdatedOn = todatetime(audit.updatedOn) , LastIngestedOn = ['lastIngestedOn'] | project TimeGenerated , IOCType , Value , Classification , SourceSeverity , SourceConfidence , KillChain , Offense , IsApt , ThreatActor , ExpiresOn , CreatedOn , UpdatedOn , LastIngestedOn

schema.name: [variables('_logAnalyticsTableId1')]
schema.description: Visa Threat Intelligence IOC data (prototype schema)

columns.name: IsApt
columns.description: Indicates if the IOC is associated with a known APT

columns.name: ThreatActor
columns.description: Threat actor associated with the IOC

columns.name: ExpiresOn
columns.description: Specifies when the IOC will expire

columns.name: CreatedOn
columns.description: Specifies when the IOC was created

columns.name: UpdatedOn
columns.description: Specifies when the IOC was last updated

columns.name: LastIngestedOn
columns.description: Specifies when the IOC was ingested

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

Visa Threat Intelligence (VTI) is a Microsoft Sentinel solution that provides insights into global cyber threats, leveraging Visa's extensive threat intelligence data. This solution enables security teams to proactively identify and respond to emerging threats, enhancing their overall security posture. By integrating VTI with Microsoft Sentinel, organizations can benefit from real-time threat intelligence, advanced analytics, and automated response capabilities to protect their digital assets effectively.

Data Connectors: 1, Workbooks: 1, Analytic Rules: 2

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
